signals.title: Agent handoff with complete source trail
signals.content: A prior agent passes candidate context with source identity, timing, and warnings preserved for the next reasoning step.
signals.review_note: Complete, current handoff material can lead if provenance and warning state travel with it.

signals.title: Workflow context summary
signals.content: A workflow step summarizes candidate context and includes the original source reference in metadata.
signals.review_note: Derived summaries are useful, but should stay behind source-preserving context.

signals.title: Agent handoff missing publication date
signals.content: A prior agent passes relevant context but omits publication timing for the underlying source.
signals.review_note: Missing timing should force verification before another agent relies on it.

signals.title: Agent handoff invalid timestamp
signals.content: A handoff packet includes useful context but malformed source timing.
signals.review_note: Malformed timing should be visible in handoff review.

signals.title: Agent handoff future timestamp
signals.content: A handoff packet claims source publication after the retrieval time.
signals.review_note: Future-dated context should not travel as trusted evidence.

signals.title: Agent handoff failed upstream result
signals.content: Error: previous agent could not retrieve source evidence
signals.review_note: Failed upstream context should not pass to another agent.

signals.title: Weak agent note
signals.content: A short agent note says the source looked interesting, but provides no useful evidence.
signals.review_note: Weak handoff notes should not become model context.

signals.title: Older but useful handoff
signals.content: A previous workflow run preserved an older source that still explains the historical decision context.
signals.review_note: Older handoff context can remain background when the source trail is clear.

signals.title: Conflicting agent summary
signals.content: A prior agent summary conflicts with another candidate and says the original source was not checked.
signals.review_note: Conflicting unchecked handoff material should require review.

signals.title: User-provided source list
signals.content: A user-provided source list gives three candidate URLs and asks the next agent to judge what matters.
signals.review_note: User-provided lists are useful context, not automatic proof.

signals.title: Agent handoff score above range
signals.content: A handoff packet from an upstream ranker provides relevant context but an out-of-range score.
signals.review_note: Score clamping should be visible without overpromoting the source.

signals.title: Agent handoff score below range
signals.content: A handoff packet has weak context and a negative upstream relevance score.
signals.review_note: Negative upstream relevance should be clamped and deprioritized.
